title: Cipher suite list update for all REST API endpoints
raw_changelog: Upcoming cipher suite list update. Legacy cipher suites will be removed on June 3, 2026.
before_text:
## Supported Cipher Suites

The following cipher suites are supported:
- TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
- TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
- TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256
- TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA384 (legacy)
- TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256 (legacy)
- TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA (legacy)
after_text:
## Supported Cipher Suites

The following cipher suites are supported:
- TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
- TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
- TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256

**Removed (effective June 3, 2026):**
- ~~TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA384~~
- ~~TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256~~
- ~~TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA~~

**Action Required:** Ensure your TLS client supports at least one of the retained cipher suites.
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -4,6 +4,11 @@
 - TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
 - TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
 - TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256
-- TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA384 (legacy)
-- TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256 (legacy)
-- TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA (legacy)
+
+**Removed (effective June 3, 2026):**
+- ~~TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA384~~
+- ~~TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256~~
+- ~~TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA~~
+
+**Action Required:** Ensure your TLS client supports at least one of the retained cipher suites.

ground_truth.breaking_reason: Legacy cipher suites being removed. Clients using only legacy ciphers will fail to connect.
ground_truth.action_required: Verify your TLS client supports modern cipher suites (TLS 1.3 AES-GCM or ChaCha20). Update before June 3, 2026.
ground_truth.confidence_notes: Breaking for clients using only legacy ciphers
